instruction: open physical device panel of the device manager in android studio

location.label: Physical tab in Device Manager
location.name: Physical tab in Device Manager
location.reasoning: The Physical tab is located next to the Virtual tab in the Device Manager panel. The gpa_detector icon candidate z3 (display_bbox=[392, 215, 499, 253]) encompasses the 'Physical' tab text/clickable area, with center at (446, 234). Clicking here will switch from the current Virtual tab to the Physical tab.

history.reasoning: Stage 1: Cropping to the Device Manager panel area at the top of the Android Studio window. The panel contains 'Virtual' and 'Physical' tabs - the 'Physical' tab is the target. This crop includes the Device Manager header, tab bar, and device list area, providing enough context to identify and select the correct tab in subsequent rounds.

The target is the 'Physical' tab in the Device Manager panel. I can see the Device Manager panel header with 'Virtual' and 'Physical' tabs visible. I'll crop to the Device Manager panel region to focus on the Virtual/Physical tabs, with the header and Create Device button for context, ensuring the Physical tab label and its clickable area are clearly preserved.

The target is the 'Physical' tab in the Device Manager. For control-group selection, I need to include both the 'Virtual' and 'Physical' tabs to maintain disambiguation context. The Physical tab is located around x=420-510, y=107-122 in displayed coordinates, adjacent to the Virtual tab. The crop includes both tabs and surrounding context (Device Manager header above, Create Device button area below) to clearly show the control group and allow easy click on the Physical tab in the next stage.
